notes: No public IBIPIMO API documentation or machine spec could be found (it is a private laboratory information system). Authored a focused OpenAPI 3.0.3 from the adaptor surface: exact POST paths /api/v1/post-viral-load-requests and /api/v1/ask-for-vl-results were confirmed in dist/index.cjs; GET /api/v1/samples/status and /api/v1/sites come from the get() JSDoc examples. Request bodies (siteid, samples[], sample_uids[]) match the documented examples. Response shapes are best-effort reconstructions from the processViralLoadResults/processViralLoadSubmission descriptions (savedSamples, errors, availableResults, pending, published) and should be treated as approximate.
